revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月十二]][[zh:四月十二]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 12|qq=April 12}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kōryū (Wu)|ja|黄龍 (呉)|lt=Kōryū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōryū (Wu)|1=Huanglong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8011756}} First Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|229|en|229|qid=Q32175|lt=229|1=229}} {{ill|May 22|en|May 22|qid=Q2581|lt=May 22|1=May 22}} ) - In {{ill|Eastern Wu|en|Eastern Wu|qid=Q274488|lt=Wu|1=Eastern Wu}} , {{ill|Sun Quan|en|Sun Quan|qid=Q313327|lt=Sun Quan|1=Sun Quan}} ascended to the throne as emperor. The division of the Three Kingdoms was established. * {{ill|Jōkyū|en|Jōkyū|qid=Q1195428|lt=Shōkyū|1=Jōkyū}} First Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1219|en|1219|qid=Q5388|lt=1219|1=1219}} {{ill|May 27|en|May 27|qid=Q2587|lt=May 27|1=May 27}} ) - From {{ill|Kempo (era)|en|Kempo (era)|qid=Q1194251|lt=Kenpō|1=Kempo (era)}} to Shōkyū via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}} . == Births == * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|May 27|en|May 27|qid=Q2587|lt=May 27|1=May 27}} ) - {{ill|Tōyama Mitsuru|en|Tōyama Mitsuru|qid=Q1140643|lt=Atayama Mitsuru|1=Tōyama Mitsuru}} , {{ill|Right-wing politics|en|Right-wing politics|qid=Q76074|lt=Right-wing|1=Right-wing politics}} activist (+ {{ill|1944|en|1944|qid=Q5268|lt=1944|1=1944}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 40th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1907|en|1907|qid=Q2048|lt=1907|1=1907}} {{ill|May 24|en|May 24|qid=Q2584|lt=May 24|1=May 24}} ) - {{ill|Yoshiko Kawashima|en|Yoshiko Kawashima|qid=Q233531|lt=Kawashima Yoshiko|1=Yoshiko Kawashima}} , princess of {{ill|Manchukuo|en|Manchukuo|qid=Q30623|lt=Manchukuo|1=Manchukuo}} , special agent, and activist (+ {{ill|1948|en|1948|qid=Q5165|lt=1948|1=1948}} ). == Deaths == * [[Ōei]]{{efn|July 1394 through April 1428|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 31st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1424|en|1424|qid=Q6276|lt=1424|1=1424}} {{ill|May 10|en|May 10|qid=Q2557|lt=May 10|1=May 10}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Go-Kameyama|en|Emperor Go-Kameyama|qid=Q451864|lt=Emperor Gokameyama|1=Emperor Go-Kameyama}} , 99th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} . * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki (era)|2=ja|3=元亀|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1145064}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} {{ill|May 13|en|May 13|qid=Q2560|lt=May 13|1=May 13}} ) - [[Takeda Shingen]]{{efn|Japanese feudal lord (1521–1573)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda Shingen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , {{ill|Sengoku Daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku Daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5384684}} (* {{ill|1521|en|1521|qid=Q6288|lt=1521|1=1521}} ). '''Chronology''' (年表)
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|11|4|13|3|12|5|4|0412|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ja:年表]]
[[ar:April 12 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月十二]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月十二]]
